flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Haverford College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.7k → $39.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Haverford College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.2k → $70.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Haverford College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Haverford College are 50% above 6-year earnings ($53.4k → $80.0k).
